provides.name: AES-256-GCM secrets
provides.summary: Encrypt/decrypt secrets at rest with AES-256-GCM, token = base64(nonce+ciphertext). App-agnostic: caller passes a 32-byte (base64 or raw) key. Use for API keys, access tokens, and other credentials stored on disk.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial extraction from finance-tracker app/crypto.py; key is now passed in (decoupled from app settings) so the same code backs every app.

provides.name: Design tokens (dark warm theme)
provides.summary: The house dark-warm design system as framework-agnostic CSS custom properties (--pb-* namespace): brand/amber accent, warm-gray surfaces, text ramp, semantic status colors, font stacks. Consumed by React+Tailwind (map @theme to it) and vanilla CSS/HTMX (use the vars). The single source of truth for color across the fleet.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial canonical palette, lifted from pandoras-box web/src/index.css (the warm-amber dark theme).

provides.name: Button
provides.summary: House button with variants (primary/secondary/ghost/danger), sizes, icon slot, and loading state.

changelog.1.1.0: forwardRef so callers can focus it (e.g. a dialog's confirm action).

provides.name: Card
provides.summary: Surface card with optional title row + actions; the standard content container.

provides.name: Badge
provides.summary: Small status/label pill with semantic tones (brand/accent/success/warning/error/info).

provides.name: Spinner
provides.summary: Inline spinning loader (lucide Loader2).

provides.name: Modal
provides.summary: Centered modal dialog over a dimmed backdrop; Escape + backdrop close, optional title + footer.

changelog.1.1.0: Focus management (move focus in on open via initialFocusRef/container, restore to the trigger on close), aria-labelledby from the title, and a testId prop.

provides.name: ConfirmDialog
provides.summary: Confirmation modal with cancel/confirm actions and a danger variant for destructive ops.

changelog.1.1.0: Autofocus the confirm button, document-level Enter→confirm (once, never while loading or when focus is on a button), Escape→cancel, testId passthrough.

provides.name: Form fields
provides.summary: Form primitives: TextField, SelectField, ToggleField (switch), CollapsibleSection — labeled, themed, with descriptions + focus ring. Includes TextField, TextAreaField, SelectField, ToggleField, CollapsibleSection.

changelog.1.1.0: TextField/TextAreaField forward arbitrary input attrs (data-testid/onKeyDown/aria-label/…); added TextAreaField (multiline). Requested by learning + figma.

provides.name: StatCard (KPI)
provides.summary: KPI/stat tile: label, big tabular value, optional sub + icon, semantic tone. For dashboards.

provides.name: DataTable
provides.summary: Generic typed data table: column defs (render/align), row click, right-aligned numeric cols, empty state.

provides.name: EmptyState
provides.summary: Centered zero/empty state with optional icon, message, and call-to-action.

provides.name: PageShell
provides.summary: Full-height view shell: sticky header (icon + title + actions, optional back/close) over a scrollable body. The pattern behind Notes/Components/settings views.

provides.name: Toast
provides.summary: Toast notifications (info/success/error), stacked bottom-right with auto-dismiss. ToastProvider + useToast hook.

provides.name: useIsWideViewport
provides.summary: React hook tracking the Tailwind md breakpoint (>=768px), SSR-safe. For responsive layout switches.

provides.name: Tooltip
provides.summary: Hover/focus tooltip portaled to document.body and positioned fixed so it escapes overflow-clipping ancestors, with viewport clamping; dismisses on scroll/resize.

provides.name: OverflowMenu
provides.summary: Generic three-dot overflow menu rendering a list of action items, with dismiss-on-Escape and outside-click handling and an optional data-tour anchor on the trigger.

provides.name: ContentSplit
provides.summary: Two-pane horizontal split with a drag-to-resize handle (double-click to collapse) and best-effort width persistence to localStorage; publishes the live width as a CSS var.

provides.name: DatePicker
provides.summary: Token-styled date field: typeable input + portal popup month calendar (floats above WebGL/overflow). ISO YYYY-MM-DD value, optional min. Promoted from flight-scanner.

changelog.1.0.0: Promoted from flight-scanner (the shared form-fields set had no date input).

provides.name: SegmentedControl
provides.summary: Pill segmented toggle for one-of-N (trip type, sort, view mode, tabs). Generic + token-only. Promoted from flight-scanner.

provides.name: Autocomplete
provides.summary: Debounced async combobox; caller supplies fetchOptions(q)=>Promise<Option[]>. Generic + token-only. Promoted from flight-scanner.

changelog.1.0.0: Promoted from flight-scanner (its AirportAutocomplete is now a thin wrapper).

provides.name: Tabs
provides.summary: Scrollable underline tab BAR for section nav (overflows gracefully on mobile). Distinct from ui.segmented-control (fixed inline pills for 2–5 options). Promoted from figma-localization.

provides.name: GeoGlobe
provides.summary: One data-driven 3D globe: weighted points (activity maps) AND great-circle arcs with an optional craft marker animated along any arc (route views). Optional hover-tooltip HTML, configurable atmosphere/background. Heavy deps (react-globe.gl+three) are optional peers, exported only from the /globe subpath. Merged from flight-scanner + finance-tracker.

changelog.0.2.0: Unified: + arcs + animated marker (flight-scanner) + hover tooltips + atmosphere/background props; moved to /globe subpath with optional peer deps.

provides.name: TimeSeriesChart
provides.summary: Generic multi-line time-series chart (Recharts) on the house dark theme; pass data + series defs + xKey, optional value/x formatters. Heavy dep recharts is an optional peer, exported from the /charts subpath. Promoted from stock-trading.

provides.name: BarChartCard
provides.summary: Generic token-driven Recharts bar chart inside a house Card; {label,value}[] data, vertical or horizontal, empty state. Exported from the /charts subpath (recharts optional peer). Promoted from consulting.

provides.name: useApi
provides.summary: Data-fetching hook with loading/error/reload state + a default same-origin JSON GET fetcher (FastAPI error extraction). Promoted from finance/stock/consulting (identical copies).

provides.name: Donut
provides.summary: Generic donut/pie chart on the house dark theme; {label,value}[] + optional value formatter + legend. Exported from /charts (recharts optional peer). Completes the chart set. Promoted from finance-tracker.
